summary: Frontend testing iteration 5 - DELETE CONFIRMATION POPUP feature. All tests PASSED. New feature working correctly: popup appears on delete click, 'No' cancels and keeps item, 'Yes, Delete' removes item permanently. Regression tests passed.

DELETE_POPUP_APPEARS.description: Clicking trash icon shows delete confirmation popup
evidence: Popup appears with shadcn Dialog component
Title shows 'Delete Barcode' with red trash icon
Message shows 'Hey, you want to delete this barcode (XXXX) or not?'

DELETE_POPUP_SHOWS_BARCODE.description: Popup message includes the barcode number

DELETE_NO_BUTTON.description: Clicking 'No' closes popup and keeps item in list
evidence: Popup closed after clicking No (outline button)
Item remained in list - verified by item count and barcode visibility
Screenshot shows 3 items before, 3 items after No click

DELETE_YES_BUTTON.description: Clicking 'Yes, Delete' (red button) permanently removes item
evidence: Popup closed after clicking Yes, Delete
Item removed from list - console shows '2 items remaining'

DATA_TESTID_ATTRIBUTES.description: Both buttons have correct data-testid attributes

REGRESSION_SCAN_FLOW.description: Basic scan flow still works correctly

seed_data_creation: None - used existing mock master data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Delete confirmation popup feature fully implemented and tested. handleDelete shows popup, handleDeleteConfirmed deletes item, handleDeleteCancelled closes popup. Dialog component at lines 1825-1855 in ScanItems.jsx. data-testid attributes: delete-confirm-btn, delete-cancel-btn.
